text.title: Message Queue Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply mq-patterns end-to-end.

step.name: collect-context
step.action: Enumerate every async call; capture throughput + latency.

step.name: pick-topology
step.action: Apply decision tree to each pair → topology.

step.name: write-contract
step.action: Author topology-contract.yaml with all required fields.

step.name: review-with-consumers
step.action: All consumers sign off on schema + retry + DLQ.
